nodes.title: Count iterated entries instead of array slots
nodes.why: for...of observes sparse-array holes as undefined and supports every documented synchronous iterable.
nodes.tradeoff: The iterable contract is broader and avoids hole-related pending promises.

nodes.title: Resolve immediately when any promise fulfills
nodes.why: Promise.any is first-success wins, so we should stop waiting once one value fulfills.
nodes.alternative: Wait for every promise to settle before deciding.
nodes.tradeoff: Fast success path, but pending tasks may continue running in background.

nodes.title: Aggregate reasons in iteration order
nodes.why: Rejections can finish in any order, but AggregateError.errors follows input iteration order.
nodes.tradeoff: Reserved indexes require O(n) storage but provide stable diagnostics.
